anomalies.message: Explanation contains OCR artifact: variable substitution notation rendered as \frac{t = -u}{-a} instead of \xlongequal{t = -u}. Mathematical meaning is still discernible.
Explanation uses f^{\prime \prime}(x) for both second and third derivatives. The flattening of f^{\prime \prime \prime} to f^{\prime \prime} does not affect the logical flow of the proof.

resolvedFromPrevious: Q10 incomplete_options — option A restored from paper Markdown; warning resolved in structure-repair, confirmed in md-finalization
